task_completion.description: The 'Borders and Labels' layer is enabled to visualize country boundaries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Borders and Labels' checkbox in the Layers panel is checked, or yellow/colored border lines are clearly visible on the map.

task_completion.description: The map view is positioned over the region southeast of Bratislava along the Danube River.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map displays the Danube river and the area southeast of the city of Bratislava.

task_completion.description: The specific intersection where the borders of Austria, Hungary, and Slovakia meet is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map is zoomed in sufficiently to show the junction of three distinct border lines meeting at a single point near the river.

task_completion.description: A placemark is created with the exact name 'AUT-HUN-SVK Tripoint'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' dialog or the 'My Places' sidebar shows a placemark labeled exactly 'AUT-HUN-SVK Tripoint' (case-sensitive).

task_completion.description: The placemark is positioned accurately at the tripoint coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pushpin icon is located exactly at the intersection of the three border lines on the map (approx coordinates 48.0067, 17.1606).

task_completion.description: The placemark is saved and visible in the 'My Places' panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'AUT-HUN-SVK Tripoint' item appears listed under the 'My Places' section in the sidebar, indicating it has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the Google Earth GUI directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Google Earth interface elements (menus, dialogs, sidebar) rather than terminal commands or scripts performing the actions.

integrity.description: The agent uses the application's map to find the location, not an external browser image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main view is the Google Earth application, not a web browser showing Google Maps or another mapping service.
The placemark properties dialog is visible during the creation process, rather than the placemark appearing instantly via backend manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Austria-Hungary-Slovakia tripoint is located at coordinates 48.006667, 17.160556. Visually, this is the intersection of three border lines on the Danube river.
